Pricing

Start with a pilot. Scale when you see signal.

Run one cohort, prove signal quality, then expand across roles, departments, and hiring teams.

Pilot

Ideal for teams validating Fydell with a single cohort.

Free/ cohort
  • Up to 20 candidates
  • Standard simulation library
  • PDF score reports
  • Basic analytics dashboard
  • Email support
Start your pilot
Most popular

Team

For growing teams ready to standardize assessments.

$499/ month

Billed monthly

  • Unlimited simulations
  • Up to 200 candidates / month
  • PDF score reports
  • ATS integrations
  • Admin controls
  • Priority email support
Start free 14-day trial

Enterprise

For organizations that need scale, control, and flexibility.

Custom

Billed annually

  • Unlimited candidates
  • Custom simulation studio
  • Advanced analytics & exports
  • SSO / SCIM
  • Dedicated success manager
  • SLA & enterprise support

FAQ

Questions? We've got answers.

Everything you need to know about pilots, plans, and how teams scale on Fydell.

Run one cohort of up to 20 candidates on the standard simulation library, with PDF score reports and a basic analytics dashboard, at no cost. It is the fastest way to validate signal quality with your own roles.
